g.text: D4 - Data Flow Diagram | gap-genai-discovery | OWASP DFD with trust boundaries
TB3 - Internal Cloud Run mesh (sa-* identities)

text.tspan: TLS term + OIDC (Cloud Run native IAP)

g.text: F1 OIDC sign-in (HTTPS, OIDC code grant)
F5 chat request (HTTPS internal, IAP JWT)
F6 normalised question (HTTPS internal, SA token)
F10b INSERT feedback (PSC, sa-agent dataEditor on feedback only)
F12 Confluence CQL export (HTTPS via NAT, PAT)
F13 write HTML + sidecars (PSC, SA token, CMEK)
F17 write eval metrics (PSC, SA token)
F20 git push trigger (HTTPS, signed webhook)
F21 push image (HTTPS internal, SA token)
F23a Cloud Audit Logs (managed MCP, auto)
F24 log-based metric -> budget + alert policy (AR-6)
